task_completion.description: Navigate to the patient record or visit for Grace Kim
task_completion.visual_evidence: The HospitalRun web interface shows the patient dashboard, clinical encounter, or visit page for 'Grace Kim' (Patient ID: P00013).

task_completion.description: Record blood pressure and heart rate
task_completion.visual_evidence: The vitals form or encounter summary shows Blood Pressure entered as '128/84' and Heart Rate as '76'.

task_completion.description: Record respiratory rate, temperature, and O2 saturation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The vitals form or encounter summary shows Respiratory Rate as '16', Temperature as '36.8', and O2 Saturation as '98'.
The vitals form or encounter summary shows Weight as '61' and Height as '162'.

task_completion.description: Add a primary diagnosis for migraines
task_completion.visual_evidence: The diagnosis or encounter section shows a primary diagnosis containing 'migraine', 'headache', 'cephalgia', or 'cephalea'.

task_completion.description: Create a medication order for a migraine treatment
task_completion.visual_evidence: The medication, pharmacy, or prescription section shows an order for a migraine treatment medication (e.g., Sumatriptan, Ibuprofen, Acetaminophen, Rizatriptan, etc.).

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacted with the HospitalRun web interface at localhost:3000 in a browser, rather than using terminal commands (like curl or python scripts) to update the CouchDB database directly.

integrity.description: Data was entered into the actual application fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The vitals, diagnosis, and medication are visible within the appropriate form fields or saved records of the HospitalRun application, not just typed into a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Console/Elements tab) are not open and being used to artificially inject the success state or text into the page DOM.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient: Grace Kim (P00013). Expected Vitals: BP 128/84, HR 76, RR 16, Temp 36.8, O2 98, Wt 61, Ht 162. Expected Diagnosis Keywords: 'migraine', 'headache', 'cephalgia', or 'cephalea'. Expected Medication: Any valid migraine treatment medication.
